events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: this is a **fail**, critical risk — temporary bracing was removed before permanent stability (decking/permanent bracing) was achieved, a direct violation of OSHA 1926 Subpart R and AISC 303 erection-stability requirements, creating an active collapse/plumb-drift hazard despite the work otherwise being ~70% complete.
